issue: Desktop home displayed the native React hero first and swapped to the enhanced category/location layout after delayed network work or hydration.
root_causes: ensureDesktopHome awaited Supabase lookups, finance settings, ads and promotions before applying the desktop hero controls.
Two delayed ensureDesktopHome calls at 500ms and 1400ms caused visible layout rewrites.
Desktop home was excluded from the route MutationObserver, so React hydration could restore the competing native hero.
Hero entrance animations exposed a partially transparent intermediate first paint.
fixes: Installed a desktop pre-paint watcher before the deferred React bundle mounts.
Rendered the final category/location shell immediately from fallback data.
Loaded lookups, finance, ads and promotions in parallel in the background.
Included desktop home in the route observer lifecycle.
Removed the delayed 500ms and 1400ms desktop rewrites.
Disabled the desktop hero's temporary opacity/slide entrance state.
Guarded repeated section style writes to avoid observer feedback loops.
